3039130.name: Rogue Wheels
3039130.description:
Rogue Wheels is a turn-based roguelike deckbuilder where your car is your character.

Drive through dangerous areas, face off against hostile vehicles, and navigate unpredictable locations and events. Every run challenges you to adapt your deck, plan your actions, and survive the road ahead.

Deckbuilding is at the core of Rogue Wheels. Each run starts with a basic deck that you gradually customize by drafting new cards, upgrading existing ones, and removing unwanted cards. Simple mechanics early on give way to deep strategic choices as your runs progress.

Combat revolves around timing and sequencing. Cards are played into different resolution lanes, and both you and your enemies commit actions at the same time. Success depends not only on what you play, but when it resolves.

Key Features

  • Turn-based combat with shared timing

  • Strategic lane based resolution system

  • Run based deckbuilding and progression

  • Roguelite unlocks that expand future runs

  • Multiple regions, each ending with a boss encounter

Every run is different. Learn from failure, unlock new options, and push further on your next attempt.

EARLY ACCESS NOTE: All card art is being created by a dedicated artist, and updated visuals will be added soon!
